title: Accepting Bitcoin for Ebook Sales: Everything You Need to Get Started — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: You're a Kenyan digital creator, and you've tried everything to sell your ebooks online. You've applied for PayPal accounts, but they keep getting rejected. You've tried Stripe, but their fees are too high, and you can't afford to lose 3% of every sale. You've even tried local payment gateways, but they're only accepted by a handful of platforms. You're in a tough spot, but there's a way out. You can start accepting Bitcoin for ebook sales, and it's easier than you think.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

The beauty of accepting Bitcoin lies in its decentralized nature. It's not controlled by any government or institution, which means that anyone in the world can use it to make a payment. In Kenya, where banks and payment gateways can be unforgiving, Bitcoin offers a lifeline. With Bitcoin, you can sell your ebooks to anyone, anywhere, without worrying about restrictive payment policies or high fees. It's a game-changer for creators like you who want to reach a global audience.
What You Need Before You Start

To start accepting Bitcoin, you'll need a few tools in your arsenal. First, you'll need a digital wallet to store your Bitcoin. You can use a software wallet like Electrum or a hardware wallet like Ledger. Next, you'll need a payment gateway that can process Bitcoin transactions. NOWPayments is a great option, as it supports over 300 different cryptocurrencies and has no fiat on-ramp fees. Finally, you'll need a platform to host your ecommerce store. Web3 Wallet Connect is a great option, as it integrates with NOWPayments and provides a seamless checkout experience for your customers.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

Setting up your payment and delivery pipeline is the hardest part of the process, but it's also the most rewarding. With Web3 Wallet Connect, you can easily integrate NOWPayments into your ecommerce store and start accepting Bitcoin payments. Once a customer makes a payment, you can automatically deliver your ebook to them via email. Web3 Wallet Connect takes care of the technical details, so you can focus on what you do best: creating amazing ebooks that people love to read.
Don't worry about high fees; NOWPayments has got you covered.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

Going live and making your first sale is the most exciting part of the process. With your payment and delivery pipeline set up, all you need to do is promote your ebook to your audience and wait for the sales to roll in. When a customer makes a payment, Web3 Wallet Connect will automatically send them a download link for your ebook. You can track your sales and analytics in real-time, so you can see exactly how your ebook is performing.
Scaling Once the System Is Running
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

The fastest path to your first crypto-native digital product sale is a three-step process. First, set up NOWPayments — create an account, configure your wallet address, get your API key. Second, deploy the Core Shop Engine with your product file and NOWPayments credentials. Third, configure Web3 Wallet Connect with your checkout settings and product details. At that point, your store accepts crypto payments and delivers the product automatically. The complete setup, following the included deployment guide, takes most creators two to four hours from start to first test transaction. The Full Stack Bundle at $79.99 includes all three components plus the deployment guide and support access. For a creator who cannot use PayPal or Stripe, this is the infrastructure that makes selling digital products viable.
Web3 Wallet Connect makes it easy to integrate NOWPayments and start accepting Bitcoin payments.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're new to ecommerce, you might want to check out our guide to creating a successful ebook store. This guide covers everything from choosing the right platform to promoting your ebooks to your audience. You can also check out our guide to cryptocurrency pricing and how to use it to your advantage. And if you're looking for more tools to help you grow your ecommerce business, be sure to check out our full stack bundle.
Your Action Checklist

Here's a checklist to help you get started with accepting Bitcoin for ebook sales: 1. Sign up for a NOWPayments account and integrate it with Web3 Wallet Connect. 2. Set up a digital wallet to store your Bitcoin. 3. Create a new product in your ecommerce store and link it to your NOWPayments account. 4. Set up automated delivery for your ebook via email. 5. Promote your ebook to your audience and wait for the sales to roll in.
With over 300 cryptocurrencies supported, NOWPayments is the perfect payment gateway for your ecommerce store.
Web3 Wallet Connect — $19.99. Frontend wallet integration with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds. Let buyers pay in BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300 more coins.
